name: ai-free-tools-vscode
description: VS Code sidebar wrapper for the AI Free Tools control panel.

aiFreeTools.dreamUrl.description: URL opened by the one-click Dreamina button.

aiFreeTools.openCutUrl.description: URL opened by the video editing button.

aiFreeTools.aiCanvasProUrl.description: URL opened by the AI Canvas Pro button.

aiFreeTools.toonflowUrl.description: URL opened after the Toonflow local service is ready.

aiFreeTools.tutorialUrl.description: URL opened by the tutorial button.

aiFreeTools.openMode.description: How launch URLs are opened. simpleBrowser uses VS Code's built-in Simple Browser and falls back to a custom Webview Panel.

aiFreeTools.cardStatusSearchUrl.description: Primary card-status search server used before validating against the resolved server.

commands.title: AI Free Tools: Open Video Editor
AI Free Tools: Open AI Canvas Pro
AI Free Tools: Start Network Magic
AI Free Tools: Stop Network Magic

scripts.check: node -c src/extension.js && node -c src/providers/sidebarProvider.js && node -c src/providers/panelManager.js && node -c src/services/clashMiniService.js && node -c src/services/clashConfig.js && node -c src/services/httpClient.js && node -c src/services/serverResolver.js && node -c src/services/licenseService.js && node -c src/services/accountStore.js && node -c src/services/proxyController.js && node -c src/services/logService.js
